texto: If you want to see God do wonders in your marriage, start praising your spouse. Start appreciating and encouraging her. Every single day, a husband should tell his wife, “I love you. I appreciate you. You’re the best thing that ever happened to me.” A wife should do the same for her husband. Your relationship would improve immensely if you’d simply start speaking kind, positive words, blessing your spouse instead of cursing him or her.
autor: Joel Osteen (Your Best Life Now: 7 Steps to Living at Your Full Potential)
explicacao: Orientação direta de Joel Osteen (Your Best Life Now: 7 Steps to Living at Your Full Potential) sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “If you want to see God do wonders in your marriage, start praising your spouse. Start appreciatin…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, family-life, marriage, útil em momentos de casamento e marriage.
